title: disperis raiilabris
intro: Disperis raiilabris, also known as the 'Golden Raglet', is a rare and endangered orchid species native to India. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which are used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions. The rhizomes of Disperis raiilabris are said to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which may help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Disperis raiilabris are typically made by drying and powdering its rhizomes, which can then be mixed with water or other herbs to create teas, decoctions, or ointments for medicinal purposes.
